title: Architectural Coordinator
description:
Responsibilities:

  • Review, update and coordinate all architectural work including shop drawings for the project
  • Resolve drawings discrepancy
  • Liaise, supervise and coordinate with sub-contractors and vendors on projects and work
  • Ensure compliance with Architectural specifications, and achieve quality aspect of architectural works
  • Coordinate with architect, structural engineer and M&E engineer to resolve construction problems and issues
  • Carry out architectural works scheduling, material requisition, cost control, project supervision and documentation
  • To assist Project Manager to develop project requirements and specifications
  • To attend to construction site coordination works and meetin
  • Review project specifications, tender clarifications and construction drawings
  • Carry out daily supervision and coordination of all architectural implementations at site
  • Prepare any necessary construction method statement and technical proposal to ensure smooth transition of works
  • To liaise with RTO for inspection
  • Inspect, resolve and monitor rectifications
  • Supervise the construction of works and incorporation of materials and ensure that they are carried out in accordance with the Project Plan
  • Assist the Project Management team in ensuring that the works are carried out to schedule and in accordance to relevant regulations
  • Coordinate all architectural drawings and works, submit and update status of shop drawings and materials as well as supervise work progress
  • Liaise closely with consultants and sub-contractors; conduct routine inspection of installed works
  • Prepare / coordinate on method statement, drawings, materials, samples, work progress and other relevant documents for M&E related works
  • Identify discrepancies between M&E, Structural ID, Architectural and client provision

Requirements:

  • Relevant Degree / Diploma in Architecture or its equivalent
  • Minimum 5 years of local experience in private residential and commercial building projects will be an added advantage
  • Understand the specifications, drawings, scope and sequence of works
  • Ability to interpret construction drawings for any discrepancies
  • Awareness of requirements of relevant authorities (i.e. BCA)
  • Good team player
